creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit in branch main references this bug:

URL: https://cgit.FreeBSD.org/ports/commit/?id=764ee7f3bfe89b7389ac7ed1c1634df08f279e1e

commit 764ee7f3bfe89b7389ac7ed1c1634df08f279e1e
Author:     Gabriel M. Dutra <0xdutra@gmail.com>
AuthorDate: 2022-10-17 05:46:39 +0000
Commit:     Fernando Apesteguía <fernape@FreeBSD.org>
CommitDate: 2022-10-17 15:57:29 +0000

    devel/atlantis: Updating to 0.20.1

    ChangeLog: https://github.com/runatlantis/atlantis/releases/tag/v0.20.1

     * Golang alpine update
     * Revert "Fix concurrency in atlantis-image workflow"
     * (README) Use join.slack.com instead of custom heroku app
     * Updating to new base image
     * Fix server-configuration docs, missing newline
     * build(deps): bump github.com/microcosm-cc/bluemonday from 1.0.20 to 1.0.21
     * deps: bump terrform to 1.3.2
     * docs: fill all command line flags not in the document, and more.
     * docs: added GitHub app permission

    PR:             267138
    Reported by:    0xdutra@gmail.com (maintainer)

 devel/atlantis/distinfo | 10 +++++-----
 2 files changed, 6 insertions(+), 6 deletions(-)
